description: Canonical registry of all mirror slices. Each slice represents a discrete functional surface within a mirror that can be independently enabled, disabled, promoted, or transferred.

slices.description: Normalizes shop drawing detail formats from heterogeneous source representations into the canonical Construction OS detail schema. Handles coordinate transformations, unit conversions, and layer mapping.
slices.state_reason: Core normalization pipeline validated and activated.

slices.description: Applies construction-domain validation rules to normalized shop drawing data. Evaluates code compliance, dimensional constraints, material compatibility, and fabrication feasibility rules.
slices.state_reason: Rule evaluation pipeline validated and activated.

slices.description: Comprehensive validation layer that orchestrates schema validation, semantic validation, cross-reference integrity checks, and completeness verification for shop drawing artifacts.
slices.state_reason: Validation orchestration pipeline validated and activated.

slices.description: Manages the manifest of all shop drawing artifacts including drawings, specifications, material lists, and revision histories. Tracks artifact provenance, versions, and relationships.
slices.state_reason: Artifact tracking and manifest management validated and activated.

slices.description: Tracks the full lineage and provenance chain of shop drawing data from source ingestion through all transformation stages to final output. Enables auditability and impact analysis.
slices.state_reason: Lineage tracking and provenance chain validated and activated.

slices.description: Detects spatial and logical clashes between shop drawing elements across disciplines. Integrates with BIM coordination workflows to flag interference conditions.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting integration testing completion.

slices.description: Generates multi-discipline coordination views that overlay shop drawing elements from different trades for visual review and conflict resolution.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Depends on clash_detection activation.

slices.description: Manages the multi-stage approval workflow for shop drawings including submittal tracking, reviewer assignment, comment resolution, and approval status management.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting workflow engine integration.

slices.description: Manages revision history, version branching, and delta tracking for shop drawing documents. Maintains the complete revision chain with change annotations and author attribution.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting revision storage backend setup.

slices.description: Packages shop drawing artifacts into distributable formats (PDF, DWG, IFC) with appropriate metadata, transmittal sheets, and compliance stamps for external distribution.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting format renderer integration.

slices.description: Dispatches notifications for shop drawing lifecycle events including submittal updates, review assignments, approval decisions, and deadline reminders across configured channels.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting notification channel configuration.

slices.description: Manages shop drawing templates including title blocks, standard details, annotation libraries, and project-specific formatting rules. Supports template inheritance and override chains.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting template library population.

slices.description: Collects and aggregates operational metrics for the shop drawing mirror including throughput, latency, error rates, validation pass rates, and approval cycle times.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting metrics backend provisioning.

slices.description: Manages fine-grained access control for shop drawing operations including role-based permissions, project-scoped access, and delegation rules for review and approval actions.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting IAM policy mapping.

slices.description: Handles bulk operations on shop drawings including batch validation, batch export, batch status updates, and scheduled processing jobs for large drawing sets.
slices.state_reason: Registered and configured. Awaiting job scheduler integration.
